name: Sourdough Riz Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the dry yeast in warm milk with added sugar.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together the remaining dry ingredients and cut in butter using a pastry cutter until it resembles cornmeal.
3. Add the shredded cheese to the mixture and blend in the sourdough starter into the dissolved yeast. Stir all lightly into the flour mixture until a dough forms that just holds together.
4. Roll out the dough on a well-floured board to about 1/2-inch thickness, ensuring the top is also floured lightly to prevent sticking to the rolling pin.
5. Cut out shapes and quickly place them on a buttered baking pan, barely touching each other.
6. Work quickly as they can become sticky. Allow the dough to rise in an area free from drafts for about 1 hour at room temperature or refrigerate for about 4 hours.
7. Bake at 425°F until nicely browned, approximately 25 minutes. Serve warm with butter. Enjoy!
